<section begin="seo" />{{#seo:
|title=<%~ it.name %>
|description=<%~ it.seoDescription %>
|image=<%~ it.icon %>
|image_alt=<%~ it.name %> icon
|twitter_card=summary
}}<section end="seo" />
<section begin="infobox" />{{Infobox status effect
|name=<%~ it.name %>
|api_name=<%~ it.apiName %>
|icon=<%~ it.icon %>
<% if (it.colorHex) { -%>
|color=<%~ it.colorHex %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.verbName) { -%>
|verb=<%~ it.verbName %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.pastVerbName) { -%>
|past_verb=<%~ it.pastVerbName %>
<% } -%>
|stops_regen=<%~ it.stopsRegen %>
<% if (it.numStages) { -%>
|stages=<%= it.numStages %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.minStage) { -%>
|min_stage=<%= it.minStage %>
<% } -%>
}}<section end="infobox" />
<% if (it.tuningSection) { %>
<section begin="tuning" />
<%~ it.tuningSection -%>
<section end="tuning" />
<% } -%>

<includeonly><section begin="categories" />
[[Category:Status Effects]]
<section end="categories" /></includeonly>

[[Category:Auto-generated status-effect source pages]]
